title: Stone sculptures in a Shiva temple
description: Stone sculptures in a Shiva temple, c. 1710. Northern India, Pahari kingdoms. Gum tempera and ink on paper; page: 38 x 24.8 cm (14 15/16 x 9 3/4 in.). The Cleveland Museum of Art, Purchase and partial gift from the Catherine and Ralph Benkaim Collection; Severance and Greta Millikin Purchase Fund, 2018.112
